mapper.select: SELECT notice_id AS noticeId, member_id AS memberId, category, title, content, `count`, is_pinned AS isPinned, create_at AS createAt, update_at AS updateAt FROM notice_board ORDER BY is_pinned DESC, notice_id DESC

SELECT notice_id AS noticeId, member_id AS memberId, category, title, content, `count`, is_pinned AS isPinned, create_at AS createAt, update_at AS updateAt FROM notice_board WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice_board ( member_id, category, title, content, is_pinned ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{isPinned} )
mapper.update: UPDATE notice_board SET category = #{category}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, is_pinned = #{isPinned}, update_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
